title: Cross jesus etc
wikitext:
[]: Cross , jesus , etc....             Quote Post by Lujerker » Fri Oct 27, 2006 12:06 pm The cross of Misato ..... what is its meaning ??? about jesus ??? Why Lilith is in a cross ??? about jesus ? In the chapter where the sphere angel attack can see a church with a cross up.... then Jesus existed in Evangelion.... ??? But god = Adam+Lilith..... please i need to know.... thanks.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Oct 27, 2006 12:15 pm The religious symbolism doesn't really mean anything, it's just there. In Evangelion, there is no Jesus, there is no God, and the Angels are nothing more than aliens.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Oct 27, 2006 12:18 pm Also, check the commentary here:- http://www.evacommentary.org/op/op_1.html#cut002b

[]:             Quote Post by Lujerker » Fri Oct 27, 2006 12:27 pm many thanks... but the cross.... :?

[]:             Quote Post by Lujerker » Fri Oct 27, 2006 12:28 pm http://www.evacommentary.org/op/OP_C001b_b_big.jpg

[]:             Quote Post by Six Winged Angel » Fri Oct 27, 2006 1:53 pm That's prolly eva-01 symbolysing the devil It's in god-mode though so your partly right one thing, during nge and eoe they say "Jesus!" or "Oh christ!" or something similar anyway..........wtf?

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Fri Oct 27, 2006 2:33 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: the Angels are nothing more than aliens.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Fri Oct 27, 2006 4:04 pm MaggotMaster wrote: The Eva Monkey wrote: the Angels are nothing more than aliens.

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Fri Oct 27, 2006 6:36 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: MaggotMaster wrote: The Eva Monkey wrote: the Angels are nothing more than aliens.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Oct 27, 2006 7:00 pm Mexicans are aliens. Angels are aliens. I rest my case.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Fri Oct 27, 2006 7:04 pm Hmm I gotta go with the Monkey on this one from that angle

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Fri Oct 27, 2006 7:06 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Mexicans are aliens. Angels are aliens. I rest my case.

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Sat Oct 28, 2006 3:08 am Crosses... the reason the crosses are in EoE is the only one that may be Jesus related... Jesus is the path to god...all the souls rise up in crosses (it looks like) into GNR Lilith on the cross...perhaps it is God's idea of punishment...she was punished for doing the nasty with Satan and other demons...that may also be the reason for the cross shaped explosions...Angels are Godsent, they attack...crosses...there ya go

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sat Oct 28, 2006 5:23 am Why are you trying to mislead someone asking a question because they're curious? Do you like being an ass? Christianity has nothing to do with NGE. The Lilith in NGE isn't the concocted religious entity she is our creator. For the most part the crosses are just for show in EoE they do seem to be sending the released souls to the Black Moon but are in no way related to Jesus.

[]:             Quote Post by Derek » Sat Oct 28, 2006 1:21 pm There aren't any Divine Beings In Evangelion??????

[]:             Quote Post by InvaderRen » Sat Oct 28, 2006 2:45 pm Ive always felt that the characters in Evangelion have some kind of in a 'god' whether is be the Judeo-Christian god, i doubt it but... more later (BTW Firefox2 rocks)

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Oct 28, 2006 2:58 pm InvaderRen wrote: Ive always felt that the characters in Evangelion have some kind of in a 'god'

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Sat Oct 28, 2006 3:55 pm i know that it all came from a bunch of weird little beings from space or whatever... and i know it has nothing to do with divine beings... im just saying where the symology is... there is no possible way to deny that there is a massive amount of symbology of Judeo/ Christian mythology and Kabbalism mythology in Evangelion... like the angels themselves, the Sephira, The Evas are designed after the barons of hell, the Lance is in there, the Wandering Jew, plenty of other stuff... you need to remember that Evangelion is a STORY...Storys come from IDEAS...ideas come from inspiration...inspiration comes from things youve seen or heard

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Sat Oct 28, 2006 4:11 pm master0rolando wrote: The Evas are designed after the barons of hell ... the Wandering Jew, plenty of other stuff...
